title: Present Perfect
description: Talk about your life experiences, work history, and achievements using the Present Perfect tense.
descriptionTr: Present Perfect zamanıyla hayat deneyimlerini, iş geçmişini ve başarılarını anlat.

vocabulary.example: I have worked in logistics for five years.
vocabulary.extra: She has lived in three different countries.

vocabulary.example: I have worked with international clients before.
vocabulary.extra: He has worked at this company since 2018.

vocabulary.example: I have lived in Istanbul my whole life.
vocabulary.extra: She has lived abroad for two years.

vocabulary.turkish: olmuş / gitmiş (be fiilinin past participle hali)
vocabulary.example: Have you ever been to the United States?
vocabulary.extra: I have been very busy this week.

vocabulary.example: I have visited Germany twice for business.
vocabulary.exampleTr: İş için Almanya'yı iki kez ziyaret ettim.
vocabulary.extra: She has visited over twenty countries.

vocabulary.example: I have studied English for six months.
vocabulary.extra: He has studied business administration at university.

vocabulary.example: I have learned a lot about e-commerce this year.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Bu yıl e-ticaret hakkında çok şey öğrendim.
vocabulary.extra: She has learned three languages so far.

vocabulary.example: I have managed a team of ten people.
vocabulary.extra: She has managed big projects for international clients.
vocabulary.extraTr: Uluslararası müşteriler için büyük projeler yönetti.

vocabulary.example: I have created my own online store.
vocabulary.extra: He has created a portfolio website for his work.
vocabulary.extraTr: İşleri için bir portfolyo web sitesi oluşturdu.

vocabulary.example: I have completed three online courses this year.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Bu yıl üç online kurs tamamladım.
vocabulary.extra: She has completed her degree in marketing.

vocabulary.example: Have you ever worked in a startup?
vocabulary.extra: Have you ever given a presentation in English?

vocabulary.example: I have never been to Japan.
vocabulary.extra: He has never worked for a big company.

vocabulary.example: I have already sent my CV to three companies.
vocabulary.extra: She has already finished the project.

vocabulary.example: I haven't received a reply yet.
vocabulary.extra: Have you finished the report yet?

vocabulary.example: I have just started a new job.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Az önce yeni bir işe başladım.
vocabulary.extra: She has just come back from London.

vocabulary.example: I have worked here since 2020.
vocabulary.extra: She has lived in Ankara since she was a child.

vocabulary.example: I have studied English for six months.
vocabulary.extra: They have lived in this city for ten years.

vocabulary.example: I have recently changed my career path.
vocabulary.extra: He has recently moved to a new city.
vocabulary.extraTr: Son zamanlarda yeni bir şehre taşındı.

vocabulary.example: I have never traveled abroad for work.
vocabulary.exampleTr: İş için hiç yurt dışına seyahat etmedim.
vocabulary.extra: She has studied abroad in Canada.

vocabulary.example: She is fluent in English and German.
vocabulary.extra: I want to become fluent in English.

vocabulary.example: I have a degree in business administration.
vocabulary.extra: She has completed her degree in marketing.

vocabulary.example: I have earned a certificate in digital marketing.
vocabulary.extra: He has three certificates from online courses.

vocabulary.example: I have done an internship at a logistics company.
vocabulary.extra: She has completed her internship successfully.

vocabulary.example: I have worked as a freelance designer for two years.
vocabulary.exampleTr: İki yıldır serbest tasarımcı olarak çalıştım.
vocabulary.extra: He has been freelance since he left his last job.
vocabulary.extraTr: Son işinden ayrıldığından beri serbest çalışıyor.

vocabulary.example: I have worked with clients from ten different countries.
vocabulary.extra: She has just met with a new client.
vocabulary.extraTr: Az önce yeni bir müşteriyle görüştü.

vocabulary.example: I have updated my portfolio with new projects.
vocabulary.extra: Have you seen his portfolio? It's impressive!

vocabulary.example: I have two references from my previous jobs.
vocabulary.extra: Can I use you as a reference?

vocabulary.example: My biggest achievement has been building my own business.
vocabulary.exampleTr: En büyük başarım kendi işimi kurmak oldu.
vocabulary.extra: She has many achievements in her career.

vocabulary.example: I have received a promotion this year.
vocabulary.extra: She has worked hard and earned a promotion.

vocabulary.example: I have completed a training course in leadership.
vocabulary.extra: He has attended several training programs this year.
vocabulary.extraTr: Bu yıl birkaç eğitim programına katıldı.

grammar.title: Present Perfect: have/has + past participle
grammar.titleTr: Present Perfect: have/has + geçmiş zaman ortacı (V3)
grammar.explanation: Present Perfect tense is used for life experiences, actions that started in the past and continue now, and recently completed actions. Form: subject + have/has + past participle (V3). Use 'have' with I/you/we/they and 'has' with he/she/it.
grammar.explanationTr: Present Perfect zamanı hayat deneyimleri, geçmişte başlayıp hâlâ devam eden eylemler ve yakın zamanda tamamlanan işler için kullanılır. Yapı: özne + have/has + fiilin üçüncü hali (V3). I/you/we/they ile 'have', he/she/it ile 'has' kullanılır.
table: She has not (hasn't) worked here since 2020.
We have lived here for 5 years.
We have not (haven't) lived here for 5 years.
Have we lived here for 5 years?
I went to Paris in 2019. (Past Simple)
I have been to Paris. (Present Perfect)

tips.en: have not = haven't, has not = hasn't
tips.tr: Kısaltma: have not → haven't, has not → hasn't

tips.en: Use 'since' for a point in time: since 2020, since Monday, since I was a child
tips.tr: 'since' belirli bir zaman noktası için: 2020'den beri, Pazartesi'den beri, çocukluğumdan beri

tips.en: Use 'for' for a duration: for 5 years, for 3 months, for a long time
tips.tr: 'for' bir süre için: 5 yıldır, 3 aydır, uzun zamandır

tips.en: 'already' goes between have/has and the verb: I have already sent it.
tips.tr: 'already' have/has ile fiil arasına gelir: I have already sent it.

tips.en: 'yet' goes at the end of the sentence: I haven't done it yet. / Have you done it yet?
tips.tr: 'yet' cümle sonuna gelir: I haven't done it yet. / Have you done it yet?

tips.en: Past Simple uses specific time (yesterday, in 2019, last week). Present Perfect does NOT: I have been to Paris. (when? not important)
tips.tr: Past Simple belirli zaman kullanır (dün, 2019'da). Present Perfect'te zaman belirtilmez: I have been to Paris. (ne zaman? önemli değil)

reading.text:
My name is Eyüp and I want to share my professional journey with you.

I have worked in logistics and e-commerce for several years. I started as an intern at a small shipping company, and since then, I have gained a lot of experience. I have managed shipments to over fifteen countries and I have worked with clients from Europe, Asia, and the Middle East.

I have also improved my skills over the years. I have completed three online courses in digital marketing, and I have recently earned a certificate in supply chain management. I haven't finished my English course yet, but I have already learned a lot!

I have never worked abroad, but I have traveled to Germany and Bulgaria for business meetings. I have always wanted to work with international teams, and now I have that opportunity.

My biggest achievement has been building my own online store. I have created it from scratch, and it has grown every month since I launched it. I haven't received a promotion at my day job yet, but I have gained something better — I have become my own boss on the side!

What about you? What have you achieved so far?
reading.textTr:
Benim adım Eyüp ve profesyonel yolculuğumu sizinle paylaşmak istiyorum.

Birkaç yıldır lojistik ve e-ticaret alanında çalışıyorum. Küçük bir kargo şirketinde stajyer olarak başladım ve o zamandan beri çok fazla deneyim kazandım. On beşten fazla ülkeye sevkiyat yönettim ve Avrupa, Asya ve Orta Doğu'dan müşterilerle çalıştım.

Yıllar içinde becerilerimi de geliştirdim. Dijital pazarlama alanında üç online kurs tamamladım ve yakın zamanda tedarik zinciri yönetimi sertifikası aldım. İngilizce kursumu henüz bitirmedim ama çoktan çok şey öğrendim!

Hiç yurt dışında çalışmadım ama iş toplantıları için Almanya ve Bulgaristan'a seyahat ettim. Her zaman uluslararası ekiplerle çalışmak istemişimdir ve şimdi bu fırsata sahibim.

En büyük başarım kendi online mağazamı kurmak oldu. Sıfırdan oluşturdum ve onu açtığımdan beri her ay büyüyor. Asıl işimde henüz terfi almadım ama daha iyi bir şey kazandım — yan tarafta kendi patronum oldum!

Peki ya sen? Şimdiye kadar neler başardın?

questions.question: How long has Eyüp worked in logistics and e-commerce?
questions.questionTr: Eyüp ne kadar süredir lojistik ve e-ticarette çalışıyor?

questions.question: Has Eyüp ever worked abroad?
questions.questionTr: Eyüp hiç yurt dışında çalıştı mı?

questions.question: What certificate has Eyüp recently earned?
questions.questionTr: Eyüp yakın zamanda hangi sertifikayı aldı?

questions.question: Has Eyüp finished his English course?

dialog.title: Networking at a Business Conference
dialog.context: Eyüp bir iş konferansında. Mert adında biriyle tanışıyor. İkisi de iş deneyimlerini ve başarılarını paylaşıyor.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Hi there! I'm Mert. I don't think we've met before. Is this your first time at this conference?
lines.textTr: Merhaba! Ben Mert. Daha önce tanışmadık sanırım. Bu konferansa ilk kez mi geliyorsun?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Hi Mert! I'm Eyüp. Yes, this is my first time. I've just started networking at events like this.
lines.textTr: Merhaba Mert! Ben Eyüp. Evet, ilk kez geliyorum. Bu tür etkinliklerde yeni yeni tanışmalar kurmaya başladım.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Nice to meet you, Eyüp! So, what do you do? Have you worked in e-commerce for long?
lines.textTr: Tanıştığıma memnun oldum Eyüp! Peki, ne iş yapıyorsun? Uzun süredir e-ticarette mi çalışıyorsun?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: I've worked in logistics and e-commerce for several years. I've also created my own online store recently.
lines.textTr: Birkaç yıldır lojistik ve e-ticarette çalışıyorum. Ayrıca yakın zamanda kendi online mağazamı kurdum.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: That's impressive! Have you ever managed international shipments?
lines.textTr: Etkileyici! Hiç uluslararası sevkiyat yönettin mi?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Yes, I have. I've managed shipments to over fifteen countries. I've worked with clients from Europe and Asia.
lines.textTr: Evet, yönettim. On beşten fazla ülkeye sevkiyat yönettim. Avrupa ve Asya'dan müşterilerle çalıştım.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: That's great experience. Have you ever lived abroad?
lines.textTr: Bu harika bir deneyim. Hiç yurt dışında yaşadın mı?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: No, I've never lived abroad, but I've traveled to Germany and Bulgaria for business. What about you?
lines.textTr: Hayır, hiç yurt dışında yaşamadım ama iş için Almanya ve Bulgaristan'a seyahat ettim. Peki ya sen?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: I've lived in Dubai for three years. I've worked in supply chain management since 2017.
lines.textTr: Üç yıl Dubai'de yaşadım. 2017'den beri tedarik zinciri yönetiminde çalışıyorum.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Wow, that's amazing! Have you learned Arabic while you were there?
lines.textTr: Vay, harika! Oradayken Arapça öğrendin mi?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: I've learned some basic Arabic, but I'm not fluent yet. I've already completed a course, though. Have you studied any languages besides English?
lines.textTr: Biraz temel Arapça öğrendim ama henüz akıcı değilim. Yine de bir kurs tamamladım. İngilizce dışında dil çalıştın mı?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: I haven't studied other languages yet. I've focused on English because it's essential for international trade.
lines.textTr: Henüz başka dil çalışmadım. Uluslararası ticaret için şart olduğu için İngilizce'ye odaklandım.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: That makes sense. Have you earned any certificates recently?
lines.textTr: Mantıklı. Son zamanlarda sertifika aldın mı?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Yes! I've just earned a certificate in supply chain management, and I've completed three digital marketing courses.
lines.textTr: Evet! Az önce tedarik zinciri yönetimi sertifikası aldım ve üç dijital pazarlama kursu tamamladım.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: We should definitely stay in touch. I've been looking for someone with your experience. Here's my card!
lines.textTr: Kesinlikle iletişimde kalmalıyız. Senin deneyimine sahip birini arıyordum. Al, kartvizitim!

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Thank you, Mert! I've really enjoyed talking to you. Let's connect on LinkedIn too!
lines.textTr: Teşekkürler Mert! Seninle konuşmak çok keyifliydi. LinkedIn'den de bağlantı kuralım!

questions.question: How long has Eyüp worked in logistics and e-commerce?
questions.questionTr: Eyüp ne kadar süredir lojistik ve e-ticarette çalışıyor?

questions.question: Has Mert become fluent in Arabic?
What certificate has Eyüp just earned?
questions.questionTr: Eyüp en son hangi sertifikayı aldı?

questions.question: Why does Mert want to stay in touch with Eyüp?
questions.questionTr: Mert neden Eyüp ile iletişimde kalmak istiyor?
options: He's been looking for someone with Eyüp's experience

fillBlanks.sentence: I ___ worked in logistics for five years.
Have you ___ been to the United States?
She has ___ arrived at the office.
They have lived in Istanbul ___ ten years.
I have ___ a lot about e-commerce this year.
She has ___ her degree in marketing.

multipleChoice.question: "I ___ visited London twice." Boşluğa ne gelir?
"She ___ worked here since 2018." Boşluğa ne gelir?
"Have you ___ been to Japan?" Boşluğa ne gelir?
"I haven't finished the project ___." Boşluğa ne gelir?
"I have lived here ___ five years." Hangisi doğru?
"Hiç yurt dışında çalıştın mı?" İngilizce'si hangisi?
"I have ___ started a new job." (az önce)

sentenceOrder.correct: She has never been to Japan
He has already finished the project
I haven't received a reply yet
They have lived here for ten years
She has just started a new job
I have completed three online courses
Have you earned any certificates recently

translation.english: I have worked here for five years.
acceptAlso: I've worked here for five years
I have worked here for 5 years

translation.english: He has never been to Japan.
acceptAlso: She has never been to Japan

translation.english: I have already finished the report.
acceptAlso: I have already completed the report

translation.english: I haven't received a reply yet.
acceptAlso: I have not received a reply yet
I haven't received an answer yet
I haven't got a reply yet

translation.english: She has worked at this company since 2017.
acceptAlso: She's worked at this company since 2017
He has worked at this company since 2017

translation.english: I have completed three online courses.

translation.turkish: Az önce yeni bir işe başladım.
translation.english: I have just started a new job.
acceptAlso: I've just started a new job
